author: han0110
content:
As discussed last time, Ere now also publishes the `ere-server-{zkvm}` image with CUDA enabled:

- For Airbender, OpenVM, Risc0, SP1 they can be ran on arch `sm_{89,90,120}` (L40, RTX 40 series or RTX 50 series or RTX PRO 6000)
- For ZisK it only support single arch per build, and the published one is built for `sm_120` (RTX 50 series or RTX PRO 6000)
- Other zkVM don't support GPU yet

The image with CUDA enabled will have suffix `-cuda` like `ghcr.io/eth-act/ere/ere-server-zisk:0.3.0-cuda`
